error.signature: [RTPS_TRANSPORT_SHM] Failed to create shared memory segment

verdict.summary: Fast DDS shared memory transport fails. Common in Docker containers or when /dev/shm is too small.

dead_ends.action: Disable Fast DDS entirely and switch RMW
dead_ends.why_fails: The fix is simpler: just configure SHM correctly or disable only the SHM transport

dead_ends.action: Increase system shared memory to very large values
dead_ends.why_fails: If running in Docker, the host /dev/shm size is what matters, not sysctl settings

workarounds.action: Increase Docker --shm-size if running in containers
workarounds.how: docker run --shm-size=512m ... or add shm_size: 512m in docker-compose

workarounds.action: Disable SHM transport via Fast DDS XML profile
Set RMW_FASTRTPS_USE_QOS_FROM_XML=1 for full control over transport
